message:
gitignore: cover remaining agent/CI ephemera (rch worktrees, MCP tokens, test scratch)

A recent sweep of the working tree turned up ~35 untracked files that are
purely agent/CI byproducts but fell outside the existing patterns. Extending
.gitignore so they stop showing up as noise (and so the sensitive ones can
never be accidentally staged):

- .rch-*/
  Covers the remote-compilation helper worktrees the rch tool drops next to
  the repo (e.g. .rch-azure-check*/, .rch-azure-clippy/, .rch-azure-pool2/,
  .rch-gentlesnow-extract-tests/, .rch-gentlesnow-freshcheck2/,
  .rch-gentlesnow-postclippy2/, .rch-yellowdeer/). The existing
  .rch-target-*/ rule only caught a narrower slice.

- *.mcp.json and opencode.json
  cline.mcp.json, cursor.mcp.json, gemini.mcp.json, windsurf.mcp.json, and
  opencode.json are per-IDE MCP client configs that the local agent-mail
  setup writes into the repo root. They embed a plaintext Bearer token in
  the Authorization header for the local http://127.0.0.1:8765/mcp/ server,
  so they must never end up in history. Ignoring them closes that footgun.

- /clippy.json, /clippy.out
  Single-file clippy scratch outputs at repo root. Existing rules only
  cover /clippy_*.txt, /clippy_*.json, /clippy_output.*.

- /ubs.out, /ubs_*.out
  UBS scratch runs already had .txt/.json/.jsonl patterns, but not the .out
  variants that the current invocations produce (ubs.out, ubs_full.out,
  ubs_full2.out, ubs_net_http.out, ubs_obs.out, ubs_root.out,
  ubs_runtime.out, ubs_src.out, ubs_verbose.out).

- /check_*.txt and /out.txt
  Ad-hoc \"cargo check\"/build output captures (check_lib_out.txt,
  check_out.txt, check_output.txt, out.txt).

- Additional root-level test scratch:
  /test_cast, /test_move, /test_prefix (compiled one-off binaries matching
  the same pattern as the existing /test_heap, /test_rng, etc. entries),
  plus /test_dns.txt, /test_obligation_results.txt, /test_out.txt,
  /test_results_all.txt (log captures alongside the existing
  /test_results.txt and /test_output.txt).

No source changes; only .gitignore. After this commit 'git status' is clean
on a machine where these scratch files exist.

files.patch:
@@ -317,3 +317,32 @@ src/test_*.rs
 # Root-level test shell scripts (catch remaining)
 /test_happy.sh
 /test_script.sh
+
+# Remote compilation helper worktrees (broader than .rch-target-*/ above;
+# covers .rch-azure-*, .rch-gentlesnow-*, .rch-yellowdeer/, etc.)
+.rch-*/
+
+# Per-IDE MCP configs (CONTAIN BEARER TOKENS — must never be committed)
+*.mcp.json
+opencode.json
+
+# Clippy scratch outputs (single-file variants, complement /clippy_*.txt above)
+/clippy.json
+/clippy.out
+
+# UBS scratch outputs (.out variants, complement ubs_*.txt/json above)
+/ubs.out
+/ubs_*.out
+
+# Build/check scratch logs
+/check_*.txt
+/out.txt
+
+# Additional root-level scratch test binaries and logs
+/test_cast
+/test_move
+/test_prefix
+/test_dns.txt
+/test_obligation_results.txt
+/test_out.txt
+/test_results_all.txt
